title: 系统托盘菜单完善
summary: Implementation covers most acceptance criteria but AC4 (tooltip with status and record count) is completely missing. The code quality is good with proper tests, but the spec requirement for tooltip is not implemented.

issues.description: AC4 not implemented: Spec requires tooltip showing '当前状态（捕获中/已暂停）、今日记录数' but no tooltip is set on TrayIconBuilder. The spec explicitly states: 'When 鼠标悬停在托盘图标上, Then 显示工具提示：当前状态（捕获中/已暂停）、今日记录数'.
issues.recommendation: Add .tooltip() to TrayIconBuilder with dynamic status and record count. Use get_today_records_sync() to get count.

issues.description: AC3 (icon status indicator) uses text indicator (●/○) in menu rather than actual icon change. While this is a reasonable interpretation, the spec says '图标显示活动状态（如绿色圆点或变化）' which could imply actual icon modification.
issues.recommendation: Consider if text indicator in menu meets the requirement, or if icon change is needed. Document the design decision.

issues.description: Unused separator variables _separator2, _separator3 created but not used in menu. These appear to be placeholders.
issues.recommendation: Remove unused separator variables or use them appropriately in the menu layout.

strengths: Comprehensive test coverage for both Rust (is_auto_capture_running, get_auto_capture_status, tray_quick_note, add_quick_note_sync) and Vue (QuickNoteWindow.spec.js with 12 tests)
Clean implementation of dynamic menu rebuild on right-click to refresh status
Proper use of AtomicBool for thread-safe state management
Quick note window feature is well-implemented with proper keyboard shortcuts (Enter/Esc)
Multi-page Vite configuration for quick-note.html is correctly set up
